name: Career College Holding Co., Inc.
summary: Career College Holding Co., Inc., an online learning company, provides a network of accredited campus-based and online institutions of higher education in the United States and Europe. The company was formerly known as WorldSage, Inc. and changed its name to Career College Holding Co., Inc. in October 2008. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Cupertino, California.
